data.title: U.S. Economic Growth Expected to Accelerate, Says Apollo Economist
data.description: Apollo's chief economist, Slok, has indicated that the Federal Reserve is likely to adopt a wait-and-see approach. According to ChainCatcher, Slok anticipates that the U.S. economy will experience accelerated growth this year, surpassing current market expectations.

data.title: Solana daily validators fall lowest level since 2021 below 800
data.description:
Solana’s active validator count has reportedly dropped below 800, marking a significant decline from its peak of around 2,500 active validators in early 2023. At the same time, daily vote transaction, which is a proxy for active validator participation, have dropped by about 40%. The current number of active validators on Solana is at the […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/solana-daily-validators-lowest-since-2021/

data.title: Ethereum’s ERC-8004 Pushes AI On-Chain — And Quietly Changes Who Really Uses Crypto
data.description:
The newly introduced Ethereum standard, ERC-8004, is making significant strides in the integration of artificial intelligence within blockchain technology by enabling more seamless on-chain interactions. This development not only enhances the functionality of decentralized applications but also has subtle yet profound implications for the demographics of cryptocurrency users, shifting the landscape of who actively engages with digital currencies and how they do so. As AI becomes more intertwined with blockchain applications, it is gradually reshaping use cases, attracting a diverse range of participants from various fields who may have previously overlooked the crypto space.
source: https://blocknews.com/ethereums-erc-8004-pushes-ai-on-chain-and-quietly-changes-who-really-uses-crypto/

data.title: UBS Reaffirms S&P 500 Target Amid Strong Macro Outlook
data.description: UBS has reiterated its target for the S&P 500 index at 7,700 points, citing a robust macroeconomic environment that could bolster U.S. stock markets. According to ChainCatcher, UBS Chief Investment Officer and Global Head of Equities, Ulrike Hoffmann-Burchardi, expressed that the Federal Reserve is likely to continue its rate-cutting trajectory, although it is expected to pause during the current easing cycle. Hoffmann-Burchardi noted that further evidence of a weakening U.S. labor market and controlled inflation may allow the Fed to proceed with additional rate cuts.

data.title: 1inch steadies as team denies selling tokens
data.description:

Its statement on X read, “With respect to yesterday’s activity, no 1INCH was sold from wallets […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/1inch-steadies-as-team-denies-selling-tokens/

data.title: Bitcoin Faces Critical Period Amid Federal Reserve Decision and Supreme Court Case
data.description: Bitcoin is entering a crucial 24-72 hour period as the Federal Reserve announces its first policy decision of 2026. According to NS3.AI, this decision coincides with a Supreme Court case that challenges the independence of the Fed. The U.S. dollar has reached a four-year low, prompting discussions about Bitcoin's role as either a hedge or a risk asset. Traders will look to key indicators such as real yields, breakeven inflation, gold prices, and spot Bitcoin ETF flows to understand Bitcoin's market regime following the Fed's announcement.

data.title: Circle's Rating Upgraded to Neutral by Mizuho Securities
data.description: Mizuho Securities has revised its rating on Circle to neutral and raised its price target to $77. According to NS3.AI, analysts emphasize that the growth of the prediction market Polymarket, which utilizes USDC for settling bets, is advantageous for Circle's stablecoin USDC. The expansion of Polymarket is anticipated to persist until 2026, enhancing USDC's market capitalization and Circle's revenue.

data.title: Federal Reserve Expected to Maintain Interest Rates at January Meeting
data.description: Traders are overwhelmingly predicting that the Federal Reserve will keep its benchmark interest rate unchanged at the upcoming January FOMC meeting. According to NS3.AI, the CME FedWatch Tool indicates a 97.2% probability of no change in the interest rate, with only a 2.8% chance of a 25 basis point cut. This suggests a strong market consensus against any immediate easing of monetary policy.

data.title: Zodia Custody and Dubai Insurance Launch Crypto Wallet for Premium Payments
data.description: Zodia Custody, initiated by Standard Chartered, has collaborated with Dubai Insurance to unveil a digital wallet designed for premium payments and claims settlements using cryptocurrencies. According to NS3.AI, this wallet seeks to improve transparency, security, and operational efficiency in the UAE insurance sector while adhering to regulatory standards. The initiative supports the UAE's ambition to foster fintech innovation and integrates digital assets into routine financial activities.
